text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: MBSF 30 CCW Chronic Conditions (CHRONIC) File │ March 2022 │ V 1.0 
47 
HYPTHYRD 
LABEL: 
Hypothyroidism End-of-Year Indicator 
DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates whether a beneficiary met the Chronic Conditions Warehouse (CCW) criteria for 
hypothyroidism as of the end of the calendar year. 
SHORT NAME: — 
LONG NAME: HYPTHYRD 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
CCW (derived) 
VALUES: 
0 = Beneficiary did not meet claims criteria or have sufficient
